ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient group */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the patient enrolled in the study */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for patient communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for patient communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES patient_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the patient group */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the group belongs to */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Detailed criteria for inclusion in the patient group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_groups_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "research_institution" TEXT /* Institution conducting the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vital_signs" (
  "vital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vital sign measurement */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in pounds */,
  "systolic_bp" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure of the patient */,
  "diastolic_bp" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure of the patient */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the patient */,
  "respiratory_rate" INTEGER /* Respiratory rate of the patient */,
  "oxygen_saturation" REAL /* Oxygen saturation of the patient */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the vital sign measurement */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height of the patient in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vital sign was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vital sign was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vital_signs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_records" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was administered */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "administration_route" TEXT /* Route of administration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the treatment */,
  "pharmacy_name" TEXT /* Name of the pharmacy where the medication was dispensed */,
  "prescriber" TEXT /* Name of the prescriber */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was recorded */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the outcome */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the outcome */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of the outcome (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "measurement_tool" TEXT /* Tool or method used to measure the outcome */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the condition was diagnosed */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment received for the condition */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* Standard code for the diagnosis (e.g., ICD-10) */,
  "diagnosed_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider who diagnosed the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medical history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medical history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the test */,
  "test_code" TEXT /* Standard code for the test (e.g., LOINC) */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider who performed the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
